params.name: Scrap Cans
params.description: Following the world's destruction, what currency will dominate the economic system? One opinion we got is Nuka-Cola bottle cap, and our own answer is the aluminum can! As for why they are both part of the packaging for carbonated drinks... Well, that's a story for another day!
